zh.lifeSummary: 當Anne Stanhope於大約1510年出生時，她的父親Sir Edward Stanhope41歲，母親Lady Elizabeth Bourchier36歲。她於1535年3月9日之前與Sir Edward Seymour 1st Duke of Somerset結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1587年4月16日享年78歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭倫敦維斯特明斯特維斯特明斯特 艾比。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anne Stanhope于大约1510年出生时，她的父亲Sir Edward Stanhope41岁，母亲Lady Elizabeth Bourchier36岁。她于1535年3月9日之前与Sir Edward Seymour 1st Duke of Somerset结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1587年4月16日享年78岁，埋葬在英国英格兰倫敦維斯特明斯特維斯特明斯特 艾比。

nameMeanings.name: Stanhope
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Stanhope (Durham), from Old English stān ‘stone, rock’ + hop ‘valley’.

History: A family of this name have held the title Earl of Harrington since 1742, and were Earls of Chesterfield from 1628–1967. Philip Stanhope, 1st Earl of Chesterfield, was a Royalist soldier in the English Civil War. He was captured in 1643 and died in prison in 1656.

nameMeanings.name: Anne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

variants.name: Anni
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

en.lifeSummary: When Anne Stanhope was born about 1510, her father, Sir Edward Stanhope, was 41 and her mother, Lady Elizabeth Bourchier, was 36. She married Sir Edward Seymour 1st Duke of Somerset before 9 March 1535. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 6 daughters. She died on 16 April 1587, at the age of 78, and was buried in Westminster Abbey, Westminster, London, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anne Stanhope est née environ 1510, son père, Sir Edward Stanhope, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Lady Elizabeth Bourchier, avait 36 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Edward Seymour 1st Duke of Somerset avant 9 mars 1535. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée le 16 avril 1587, à l’âge de 78 ans, et a été enterrée à Westminster Abbey, Westminster, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Westminster Abbey, Westminster, London,: Westminster Abbey, Westminster, London, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Anne Stanhope um 1510 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Edward Stanhope 41 und ihre Mutter Lady Elizabeth Bourchier 36. Sie hat vor 9. März 1535 Sir Edward Seymour 1st Duke of Somerset geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb am 16. April 1587 im Alter von 78 Jahren und wurde in Westminster Abbey, Westminster, London, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Anne Stanhope è nata il circa 1510, sua padre, Sir Edward Stanhope, aveva 41 anni e sua madre, Lady Elizabeth Bourchier, aveva 36 anni. Lei sposato Sir Edward Seymour 1st Duke of Somerset prima del 9 marzo 1535. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 6 figlie. Morì il 16 aprile 1587, all'età di 78 anni, e fu sepolta a Westminster Abbey, Westminster, London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Anne Stanhopeが約1510年に生まれた時，父Sir Edward Stanhopeは41歳，母Lady Elizabeth Bourchierは36歳であった。1535年3月9日以前にSir Edward Seymour 1st Duke of Somersetと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1587年4月16日に78歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスロンドンウエストミンスターウエストミンスター アビーにて埋葬された。

ko.Westminster Abbey, Westminster, London,: 영국 잉글랜드 런던 웨스트민스터 웨스트민스터 애브브이
ko.lifeSummary: Anne Stanhope(이)가 대략 1510년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Edward Stanhope(은)는 41세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Elizabeth Bourchier(은)는 36세였다. 그녀는 1535년 3월 9일 이전 Sir Edward Seymour 1st Duke of Somerset(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1587년 4월 16일 78세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 런던 웨스트민스터 웨스트민스터 애브브이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Anne Stanhope nasceu aproximadamente 1510, seu pai, Sir Edward Stanhope, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Lady Elizabeth Bourchier, tinha 36 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Edward Seymour 1st Duke of Somerset antes 9 de março de 1535. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu em 16 de abril de 1587, com 78 anos, e foi sepultada em Westminster Abbey, Westminster, London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Westminster Abbey, Westminster, London,: вестминстир эбби, вестминстир, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anne Stanhope родилась около 1510 г., её отцу по имени Sir Edward Stanhope было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Lady Elizabeth Bourchier, 36. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Edward Seymour 1st Duke of Somerset перед 9 марта 1535 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 6 дочерей. Она умерла 16 апреля 1587 г. в возрасте 78 лет и была похоронена в местности вестминстир эбби, вестминстир, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Sir Edward Seymour 1st Duke of Somerset antes de 9 de marzo de 1535. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió el 16 de abril de 1587, a la edad de 78 años, y fue sepultada en Westminster Abbey, Westminster, London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
